arts.ttl: Darren Bent picks the better Arsenal defender this season between William Saliba and Gabriel Magalhaes

arts.ttl: When is Israel - France? Times, how to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Israel, who are playing their home games in the Hungarian capital due to the security situation in the Middle East, are pointless after defeats to Belgium and Italy . On an evening when Italy take on Belgium elsewhere in a big-name UEFA Nations League group, France meet bottom team Israel in Budapest .

arts.ttl: Aymeric Laporte on Spain switch and Didier Deschamps frustration
arts.sum: Spain star Aymeric Laporte has opened up on his decision to switch allegiance from France to La Roja. Laporte has emerged as a crucial player for Luis de la Fuente at the heart of Spain defence which won UEFA Euro 2024 this summer. Despite plying his club trade in Saudi Arabia, the 30-year-old is still […] The post Aymeric Laporte on Spain switch and Didier Deschamps frustration appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Ibrahima Konaté in three-man shortlist to captain France
arts.sum: Liverpool centre-back Ibrahima Konaté (25) is reportedly one of three candidates to captain France in the absence of Kylian Mbappé (25), according to a report from RMC Sport. With midfield…
